name: Test Addon
description: Developer test addon — exercises every AddonContext API feature: two searchable catalogs (movies + series), stream resolver with HTTP + HLS streams and S01E01 episode support, metadata provider with fetchSeasons / fetchEpisodes / prefetchDetails, ctx.store set/get/delete with boot counter, ctx.getAddonConfig to read another addon's config, ctx.getAddonStore for read-only cross-addon SQLite access, all three variable types (string secret / number / boolean), and teardown cleanup.
author: HephaestWatch

variables.label: API Key
variables.description: Dummy API key — tests secret field rendering in the config drawer

variables.label: Max Results
variables.description: How many items to return per catalog page

variables.label: Show debug logs
variables.description: Print verbose logs to the browser console
